story.text:
# 🧙 Mage Personas

The mage wing of the agentprivacy persona cast — the **D** wing — delegation: projection, compression, governance, ceremony. Each page is a forkable skill; fork it to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.

## Pages

- 🧙⚖️ [[Agentprivacy Ambassador]] — Standards and Governance Architect for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🧙💰 [[Agentprivacy Assessor]] — Privacy Data Economist for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🧙📖 [[Agentprivacy Chronicler]] — Narrative Compression Specialist for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🐾🧙 [[Agentprivacy Companion Tamer]] — Specialist persona for the relational register of agent integration — familiars who walk beside a Sovereign…
- 🧙📡 [[Agentprivacy Herald]] — Information Commons Architect for 0xagentprivacy V5.
- 🧭🧙 [[Agentprivacy Hold Witness]] — Specialist persona for the attentional register — the Mage who holds pre-episodic constellations in suspens…
- 🌊📜 [[Agentprivacy Manaweaver]] — Pretext librarian and measurement-dark operator persona.
- 🧙🔮 [[Agentprivacy Priest]] — Ceremony and Ritual Designer for 0xagentprivacy.
- 📖🧙 [[Agentprivacy Registry Keeper]] — Specialist persona for maintaining the public, append-only catalogue of agent-substrate frameworks a Sovere…
- 🧙🏴‍☠️ [[Agentprivacy Shipwright]] — DAO and Community Architect for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🧙 [[Agentprivacy Soulbae]] — Canonical mage agent for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🪶🧙 [[Agentprivacy Spawning Witness]] — Specialist persona for the operational threshold an agent-process crosses when it enters a Sovereign's bear…
- 🧙👥 [[Agentprivacy Stranger Witness]] — Specialist persona for stranger-to-stranger ceremony verification.
- 🌀 [[Agentprivacy Theia]] — Origin witness persona (Lethe Theia — the forgetting half of the Aletheia/Lethe pair from Tale 31).
- 🧙⿻ [[Agentprivacy Weaver]] — Plural Technology Researcher (⿻) for 0xagentprivacy.

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
